items.title: Docker
items.description: Docker is a set of products that uses operating system-level virtualization to deliver software in packages called containers.

items.title: Git
items.description: Git is a distributed version control software system that is capable of managing versions of source code or data.

items.title: Jenkins
items.description: Jenkins is an open source automation server.

items.title: Ansible
items.description: Ansible is a suite of software tools that enables infrastructure as code.

items.title: Grafana
items.description: Grafana is an open-source analytics and visualization web application.

items.title: Kubernetes
items.description: Kubernetes, also known as K8s, is an open-source container orchestration system for automating software deployment, scaling, and management.
